title: Wangle's Slime origin (datapack)
description: Wangle's Slime origin data-pack is an inspired version of SlimeyFellow Slime Origin Remastered mod which is original inspired by the Totalelipse slime origin mod.
body:
**REQUIRES ORIGIN MOD AND PEHKUI MOD**

Wangle's Slime origin data-pack is an inspired version of SlimeyFellow Slime Origin Remastered mod which is original inspired by the Totalelipse slime origin mod.


![Slime origin's powers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3cc354bba4cabcd7cca065d1e945687bf762e99.png)


If you have an issue, bug or feature request
report them on the issue tracker:
https://github.com/Wangle17/Wangles-Slime-Origin/issues
